senses.gloss: weibliche Person: Anhänger der Staatsform der Republik
senses.gloss_en_full: A woman who supports a republican form of government, where the state is governed by elected representatives rather than a monarch.

senses.gloss: weibliche Person: Mitglied oder Anhänger der US-amerikanischen Partei „Republican Party“
senses.gloss_en_full: A woman who is a member or supporter of the US Republican Party.

senses.gloss: weibliche Person: Mitglied oder Anhänger der deutschen Partei „Die Republikaner“
senses.gloss_en_full: A woman who is a member or supporter of the German political party Die Republikaner.
